non_goals: Do not redesign runtime, service, or UI architecture.
Do not weaken existing validation gates.
scope_in: Strengthen instruction locality and nested AGENTS guidance.
Define active task-contract and ExecPlan conventions under plans/.
Add task-contract schema coverage in schemas/contracts.
Extend xtask and governance validation for issue-branch-PR-plan traceability.
Normalize the canonical non-UI validation command surface.
scope_out: Separate issue-event validation outside the existing governance PR flow.
acceptance_criteria: The repository documents a deterministic read order and instruction-locality map.
Long or high-risk work can be described with a machine-readable task contract and fixed ExecPlan headings.
PR validation enforces branch issue id and linked issue consistency plus required execution artifacts for high-risk or multi-plane work.
A canonical repo-owned non-UI validation profile is available.
rollback_path: Revert the governance, xtask, schema, plans, and documentation changes together so the repository returns to the previous issue/PR-only workflow.
